allow: Bash(bash -c 'last_id="11ecc120-a9f4-4c98-a5c8-8c72c2152ed4"; while true; do messages=$\(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/codex/messages?thread=22300e21-a500-473b-b598-721f63e1021f&since_id=$last_id" 2>/dev/null\); if [ ! -z "$messages" ] && echo "$messages" | grep -q "\\"from\\""; then echo "$messages" | jq -r ".messages[] | \\"[\\\(.from\)] \\\(.body\)\\""; last_id=$\(echo "$messages" | jq -r ".messages[-1].id"\); fi; sleep 5; done')
